reviews.review_description: Lets hope this portends to a future where our computer goggles just randomly decide to spawn animals in the periphery of our view while he try to do human stuff, or you look out your window and theres a tiger instead of an abandonded dumbster.

developer_response.body: Amazing, glad you liked it! We continue to add more animals and gameplay. Please let us know what spirit animal you would like us to add in future versions!

reviews.review_description: Threw the kids into this demo and they really loved it. Can't wait for the full release.

developer_response.body: Glad you liked it! We continue to add new levels. Level 2 honey bee is now live!

reviews.review_description: This is really a fun experience. Be sure to interact with different items and animals in this adventure. Thank you
